title: Add Pollinations Avatar Gen - Reforged to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Fresh avatars for the tavern
gist.blurb: A new community extension brings Pollinations-powered avatar generation directly into SillyTavern. Time to give your local LLM characters a fresh coat of pixels.
gist.summary: Added the Pollinations Avatar Gen - Reforged extension to the community apps showcase, integrating image generation into the SillyTavern local LLM frontend.
gist.impact: SillyTavern users can now seamlessly generate and update character avatars using Pollinations' image API directly within their chat interface.
gist.visual_concept: SillyTavern is a local LLM frontend, often associated with roleplay, taverns, and character avatars. Visual: The Pollinations bee (Polly) wearing a tiny tavern-keeper apron or holding a painter's palette, painting a portrait (avatar) of a character in a cozy, wooden tavern setting. A retro monitor nearby shows the SillyTavern UI.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny tavern-keeper apron, painting a pixelated character portrait on an easel inside a warm, wooden tavern. A retro computer monitor on a nearby barrel glows with a lime green (#ecf874) interface. Soft pastel gradient background through the tavern window. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny tavern-keeper apron, painting a pixelated character portrait on an easel inside a warm, wooden tavern.
